purpose: Machine-readable minimum retrospective evidence required before knowledge-completion blockers can be closed.

requirements.rationale: Bazi interpretation rules need more than one deidentified human-approved case before stronger claims are considered calibrated.
evidence_questions: 哪个八字结构判断被现实经历验证或推翻？
日主、月令、十神、大运流年里，哪一层最容易导致误读？
哪个判断需要从强断降级为倾向或校准问题？

requirements.rationale: Ziwei palace/star interpretation needs repeated deidentified calibration before single-star or palace patterns can be treated as stable.
evidence_questions: 哪个宫位、四化或大限判断贴近现实？
哪个单星象意被放大成了过度判断？
命宫、官禄、财帛、迁移、夫妻或福德里，哪个宫位最需要重写解释边界？

requirements.rationale: Western astrology language is symbolic and time-sensitive, so reader feedback must be checked before it influences reusable wording.
evidence_questions: 哪个落座、相位或宫位语言对读者有帮助？
哪段像泛心理描述，缺少本盘特异性？
出生时间敏感项有没有导致上升、宫位或轴线误读？

requirements.rationale: Liuyao question reading needs repeated deidentified question outcomes before short-term judgment patterns can be considered calibrated.
evidence_questions: 问题后来实际结果如何，原判断哪一层准确或误导？
用神、世应、动爻、月日、旬空、六亲里哪一层需要调权重？
短期问事有没有被写成过度长期化结论？

requirements.rationale: Reader-rich paid-report writing rules require repeated deidentified reader feedback, not just internal taste.
evidence_questions: 哪段让读者愿意继续读，哪段像模板话？
哪类表达太中庸、太冲或太流程感？
结论、证据、边界和行动建议的顺序哪里需要调整？

requirements.rationale: Relationship reports combine two individual charts, deterministic cross facts and delicate reader positioning, so real deidentified feedback is required before reusable relationship claims are treated as calibrated.
evidence_questions: 哪个吸引或互补判断准，哪个张力被写成了劝退？
事业、家庭、财富、精力、亲近边界里，哪个生活域最需要调整？
报告有没有把现实关系细节误写成命理事实？

requirements.rationale: Multi-person career synastry combines individual facts, pair relationship facts, team business context and city/timing judgment, so repeated deidentified team feedback is required before reusable team-level claims are treated as calibrated.
evidence_questions: 哪个角色判断被团队现实验证，哪个其实是权责、钱账或组织机制问题？
城市判断里哪个商业变量比命理象意更关键？
新成员加入后是补短板、放大冲突，还是改变权力结构？

requirements.rationale: Fengshui and direction guidance is low-risk auxiliary advice unless repeated deidentified feedback shows which space, direction or city suggestions actually help or mislead readers.
evidence_questions: 哪条空间、方位或城市建议执行后可观察，哪条太玄或无法执行？
变化更像来自环境调整、生活习惯、商业资源，还是现实行动变化？
有没有因为缺现场勘测、罗盘坐向或户型图，导致建议必须降级？

requirements.rationale: The global retrospective layer is not complete until at least one audited human-approved retrospective has been promoted.
evidence_questions: 这条复盘能改进哪个 artifact？
有没有反例、适用限制或不能推广的地方？
是否已经去隐私并经过人工确认？
